generated_oml:
instance RobotJointSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for real-time feedback on MABI MAX 100 robot axes"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorData
]

instance RobotSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RobotJointSensor
]

instance RobotSensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time series sensor data transmitted via MQTT from MABI MAX 100 robot joints"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionAnalysisEnabler, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionAnalysisEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processing component analyzing sensor data for joint friction behavior using white-box and black-box models, enabling dynamic model exchange during runtime for accuracy maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for multi-physics simulation of robot dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]

    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService, RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]

    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]

    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]

    base:desc "C++ implementation for digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables JointFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance JavaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java implementation for digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler

    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACMEEnabler
]

instance JointFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models to enhance motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionBehaviorInsight, FrictionLossDetectionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [

    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

]

instance FrictionLossDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of friction loss in robot joints to improve control accuracy"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring data visualized via dashboard for decision support"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts for robot components based on friction analysis"
]

]

    base:desc "Motor-driven axes of MABI MAX 100 robot including first vertical axis driven by permanent magnet synchronous motor"

    base:desc "Sensors for real-time feedback on robot joints"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for streaming sensor time series data between physical assets and the digital shadow. No details on network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, or security protocols are specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
